headline: Should IDEXX’s (IDXX) SDMA-Enhanced Catalyst Panels Prompt Action From Long-Term Diagnostics Investors?
summary: Earlier in 2026, IDEXX Laboratories integrated SDMA, a key renal biomarker recognized by the International Renal Interest Society, into its widely used Catalyst in-clinic chemistry profiles in the US and Canada to support earlier detection of kidney disease in pets. This move effectively turns routine point-of-care blood testing into an advanced kidney assessment tool, potentially increasing test utilization while keeping veterinary workflows unchanged. We’ll now examine how embedding SDMA...
